LineX Workshop 2026- Day 1 Highlights 🌟

Thank you to everyone who participated and contributed to making the session a meaningful and engaging experience. Your enthusiasm and commitment truly set the tone for the workshop. 🥳

Day 1 of the LineX Workshop focused on hands-on learning in PCB Design and 3D Modelling, where participants had the opportunity to explore fundamental concepts and apply them in practical settings. The session encouraged creativity, problem-solving, and technical exploration. 🔧📏⚙️

We would also like to extend our appreciation to IEM UTeM for the collaboration and continuous support in making this workshop a success. 🙌🏼🤍

Thank you everyone once again and see you in the next workshop! 👋🏼

Thank you so much! 😊

We did it! 🏆✨

Proud to share that our Engineering Society has been nominated and emerged as the winner of Best Tech & Innovation Programme 2025 for the X-Change Summit Event at the MMU Awards 2025!

This achievement is more than just a title — it reflects the passion, creativity, and relentless dedication of every single member who made this possible. From late nights to bold ideas, this win belongs to all of you..💡⚙️

Congratulations to the entire team for pushing boundaries and working extremely hard. Here’s to continuing innovation, growth, and making an even bigger impact together..🚀

That’s a wrap for CSRW April 2026! 🎉

A heartfelt welcome to all our new members — we’re excited to have you join the MMU Engineering Society family ⚙️💙

Thank you to everyone who stopped by our booth, supported us, and registered with us. Your enthusiasm truly made this event unforgettable 🙌

Stay tuned for workshops, projects, and amazing experiences ahead 👀✨

It’s a wrap of Day 2 and the final day of the LineX Workshop 2026! 🌟🥳

Thank you to all participants for your active involvement and dedication throughout the sessions. Your effort and teamwork made the workshop both productive and enjoyable. 🤝🏼🎉

Day 2 of the Workshop emphasized hands-on experience in Soldering Techniques and the development of Line-Following robots, followed by a friendly competition. Participants were able to apply their knowledge in a practical environment, reinforcing both technical and collaborative skills.🔧⚙️🦾

We would like to express our sincere gratitude to IEM UTeM for their collaboration and support in bringing this workshop to life. 🙌🏼🤍

LineX Workshop 2026 Video Highlights! 📸✨
IEM MMU X IEM UTEM 🦾

🤖✨ Where innovation meets competition — meet the Robocon Team!
From design to problem-solving, they bring robotics expertise and creativity into motion. 🌟

#engsocmmu #robocon

Introducing the LINEX Workshop 2026, organized through a collaboration between Multimedia University Melaka and Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka — an immersive two-day programme designed to bring your technical knowledge to life through hands-on learning and real-world applications.

This workshop features hands-on sessions in:
• Printed Circuit Board (PCB) Design
• Soldering Techniques
• 3D Modelling
• Line-Following Robotics, including a Friendly Competition

Participants will benefit from guided learning, collaboration with students from MMU and UTeM, and the opportunity to apply theoretical knowledge in a practical setting.

📍 Venue: MMU Melaka
🗓 Date: 18th – 19th April 2026
🕘 Time: 9:00 A.M. – 6:00 P.M.

Additional benefits include complimentary lunch, transportation from UTeM to MMU, and a certificate of participation.

Kindly note that seats are limited. We encourage early registration to secure your place.

For any inquiries, please contact:
Amelie (+6011-10523060)-> MMU 
Keisavanaath (+6017-8712548)-> MMU
Anushiya (+6011-70179057)-> UTeM

Get ready, everyone! A new era is about to begin! 🥳🏆

It’s time to kickstart a brand-new chapter for the Engineering Society! ⚙️✨ Join us for our Annual General Meeting (AGM) — a night where we celebrate our journey, welcome the next generation of leaders, and reveal exciting plans that will drive us forward. Whether you’re a long-time member or a fresh face in the faculty, this is your moment to get involved, share ideas, and be part of something bigger. Plus…don’t miss out on our exclusive lucky draws with exciting prizes waiting to be won! 🎁🎉

Let’s engineer a future full of innovation, growth, and unforgettable achievements — together. 💡🚀
Secure your spots now by scanning the QR code — RSVP! Don't miss out on the opportunities, surprises and memories waiting for you! 😉

🗓️ Date: 11th December 2025
🕗 Time: 8 p.m. - 11 p.m.
📍Venue: MSMX 2003
🎬 A glimpse of the Engineering Society Booth preperations for CSRW !

🚀 Get ready to level up your STEM game!
Join us for Taklimat STEM KSSR & KSSM with Cikgu R. Nara 🎓, a master educator with 29+ years of experience teaching Add Maths & Physics.

✨ Learn, score, and explore how STEM shapes the future!
📅 Date: 22nd September 2025
📍 Venue: Exam Hall 

Don’t miss this chance to gain real insights and tips from an expert who has delivered over 2,000 STEM talks across Malaysia! 🌟

#STEM #KSSR #KSSM #education #Innovation #FutureReady #TaklimatSTEM #changesummit2025 #mmu

🎬 Behind the scene of the amazing props on our booth during the CSRW

WE DID IT! 🏆 Best Decoration Booth! ✨

What happens when three engineering powerhouses come together for the first time? Magic happens! 🛠️⚡️

We are incredibly proud to announce that the Engineering Society, alongside @mmuroboticsclub & @iem_mmumelaka, has won the award for Best Decoration Booth at CSRW! 🥇

This historic collaboration proves that we are stronger together. A massive shoutout to our hardworking committee members who spent sleepless nights planning, building, and decorating. This win belongs to all of you! 🙌

Thank you to everyone who stopped by. This is just the beginning!

🕣 8.30AM – 3.00PM

Drop by and support young talents as they showcase their amazing projects through the Young Innovators Challenge & Junior Innovate. 🌟

✨ Free entry

🎉 Calling All Students!
Get ready to be part of something big!

This year, MMU Melaka is proud to sponsor and host the MMU Melaka Maker Fair 2025 — a state-level STEM showcase featuring the Junior Innovate (for primary schoolers) and Young Innovators Challenge (for secondary schoolers).

📅 Date: 23rd August 2025 (Saturday)
📍 Venue: MMU Melaka

🤔 Curious to see all the amazing projects and ideas presented by young innovators? Here’s your chance to witness it all up close!

We’re on the lookout for passionate and enthusiastic volunteers to help bring this celebration of creativity, innovation, and technology to life!

✨ Why Volunteer?
✅ Earn a State-Level Certificate of Appreciation
✅ Join an Exclusive 3D Design Workshop
✅ Gain hands-on experience in event management and STEM outreach
✅ Connect with a vibrant and inspiring community

🔗 Register your interest now:
https://forms.gle/WsAdM2WKcZS3nzmC9

Let’s make this fair unforgettable — together! 🚀

🌟 X-Change Summit 2025 – Unlock Your Potential! 🌟

FREE TO PARTICIPATE!!! 

Are you ready to explore, connect, and grow with innovators, changemakers, and future leaders? 🚀

Join us at X-Change Summit 2025, a premier event where youths and teenagers come together to exchange, showcase talents, and create meaningful impact.

✨ *Main Competition:*
✅ InnoXTech Challenge - Innovation Competition 
✅ RoboticX - LadyBug Robotics Challenge 
✅ MoX - Mathematical Olympiad 
✅ CubeX - 3x3 Rubik’s Cube Competition
✅ CodeX - Competitive Programming Competition 
✅ StacX - Cup Stacking Competition 

Side quest for visitors (e-cert of participation will be provided)
⚙️ Block Programming Hackathon 
⚙️ Robotics Operation Challenge and more! 

📅 Date: 22-9-2025
📍 Venue: Exam Hall, Multimedia University, Melaka.
🎟️ Registration is now OPEN! Don’t miss your chance to be part of this transformative experience.

👉 Register here: xchangesummit.innoxtech.org
👉 Max. no. of participants for all categories (not including visitors): 800 pax.

Let’s create the future, together at X-Change Summit 2025! 🌍💡
